final:
module RefModule(  
    input clk,  
    input rst,  
    input req0,  
    input req1,  
    input req2,  
    input req3,  
    output reg [3:0] grant  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        if (rst) begin  
            grant <= 4'b0000;  
        end else begin  
            grant <= 4'b0000;  
            if (req0) begin  
                grant <= 4'b0001;  
            end else if (req1) begin  
                grant <= 4'b0010;  
            end else if (req2) begin  
                grant <= 4'b0100;  
            end else if (req3) begin  
                grant <= 4'b1000;  
            end  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
